scope.label: flow-pack
scope.note: Every number in this file is FICTION (see __fixtures__/README.md). This manifest exercises the notMeasured convention end-to-end: some optional blocks are explicit null, others are absent entirely — both mean 'not measured at baseline', NEVER 'zero problems'. Only the always-required blocks (officialBaseline, comparisonRules) carry values.

officialBaseline.status: SYNTHETIC — empty fictional baseline (0/0, null ratio); never a benchmark

comparisonRules: SYNTHETIC — fiction; null/absent blocks mean 'not measured', never 'zero problems'.
Fixture numbers are fiction (scripts/fpat/eval/__fixtures__/README.md) — never quote them as delivery data.

findings: SYNTHETIC: minimal scorecard fixture — officialBaseline + comparisonRules only; planningAccuracy/workflowReliability/boardConsistency/labelGapDecisions absent, historicalEnvelope/cycleTimes/signalQuality/parkedDecisions explicit null.
proven: Only that ScorecardSchema accepts a minimal manifest where notMeasured blocks are null or absent.
notProven: Anything about real FPAT delivery — every value here is fiction.
